## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run pytest -q` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check vmux tests` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes (esp. detectors)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`config.yaml`, tokens)
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if relevant
